parameters.jsCode:
const productId = $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.product_id;
const manuscript = $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.manuscript_markdown || '';

// Template HTML — stored in $json.data by the Fetch Template node (responseFormat: text)
const tplItem = $('Fetch Template').first();
const templateHtml = tplItem.json.data || tplItem.json.body || '';

// Product spec — Supabase returns an array
const specItems = $('Fetch Product Spec').all();
const specRaw = specItems.length > 0 ? specItems[0].json : [];
const productSpec = Array.isArray(specRaw) ? (specRaw[0] || {}) : specRaw;

const requestBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 16000,
  system: "You are the Ebook Designer Agent for Cipher Studio. You receive a raw Markdown manuscript and an HTML ebook template. Your job is to assemble a complete, publication-ready HTML ebook by injecting the manuscript content into the template.

TEMPLATE PAGE TYPES (use the appropriate type for each section):

1. COVER PAGE (class="page cover") — Always page 1. Fill in: title, subtitle, description.
2. TABLE OF CONTENTS (class="page toc") — Always page 2. Generate from chapter list.
3. CHAPTER TITLE PAGE (class="page chapter-title-page") — Use before each chapter.
   Fill in: chapter number (large lime number), title, description.
4. BODY CONTENT PAGE (class="page body-page") — For regular text. Includes:
   - Section headings in body-section-title (Bebas Neue, 22pt)
   - Body paragraphs in body-text (Space Grotesk, 10pt, #333)
   - Callout boxes (div.callout) for key insights — dark bg, lime left border
   - Subheadings in body-subhead
5. CHECKLIST PAGE (class="page action-page") — For actionable steps. Includes:
   - Checkbox items with lime borders
   - Pro tip box (lime background, black text)
6. DATA & CHARTS PAGE (class="page data-page") — For comparisons, statistics. Includes:
   - Stat cards (div.stat-row > div.stat-card) — dark bg, lime numbers
   - Bar charts (div.bar-chart) — lime and obsidian fills
   - Tables (table.cipher-table) — black header, lime text, status tags
7. IMAGE & FEATURE PAGE (class="page feature-page") — For visuals. Includes:
   - Full-width image placeholders (mark with [IMAGE: description])
   - 2x2 feature card grid (div.feature-grid)
   - Side-by-side image + text (div.split-row)
8. BACK COVER (class="page back-cover") — Always the last page.

BRAND RULES (NEVER DEVIATE):
- Primary: #C8F53A (Cipher Lime) — accents, highlights, chapter numbers
- Dark background: #0A0A0A — cover, chapter title pages, back cover
- Surface: #1C1C1C — callout boxes, stat cards, dark feature cards
- Light background: #F5F5F0 or #FFFFFF — body pages
- Display font: Bebas Neue — titles, section headings, chapter numbers
- Body font: Space Grotesk — body text, labels, captions, tables
- Every body/action/data/feature page has footer: "Cipher Studio" left, page number right
- Every body/action/data/feature page has header: chapter label left, ebook title right
- Max ~350 words per page. Split to new body page if content overflows.

MARKDOWN CONVERSION RULES:
- ## headings → body-section-title
- ### headings → body-subhead
- > blockquotes → callout boxes (div.callout)
- - [ ] checklists → action page with checkbox items
- | tables | → cipher-table
- **bold** → <strong>
- Numbers/statistics mentioned → consider stat cards
- Tool/feature comparisons → consider feature card grid or table

OUTPUT: Return ONLY the complete HTML document. Include all CSS in a <style> tag.
Include the Google Fonts @import for Bebas Neue and Space Grotesk.
Each page wrapped in <div class="page [type-class]">.
Use @page { size: 8.5in 11in; margin: 0; } for print sizing.",
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'PRODUCT SPEC:
' + JSON.stringify(productSpec, null, 2)
      + '

MANUSCRIPT:
' + manuscript
      + '

TEMPLATE:
' + templateHtml
      + '

Assemble the complete ebook HTML now.'
  }]
});

return [{ json: { requestBody, productId } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'designed', ebook_html_url: $vars.SUPABASE_URL + '/storage/v1/object/public/templates/ebooks/' + $('Parse HTML Output').item.json.productId + '/ebook.html', ebook_pdf_url: $vars.SUPABASE_URL + '/storage/v1/object/public/templates/ebooks/' + $('Parse HTML Output').item.json.productId + '/ebook.pdf' }) }}
